stops.title: St Nun's Church Tour
stops.desc: Welcome! Tap an audio tour section below or just click 'start' to begin.

stops.title: Front
stops.desc: The entrance to St Nun's church is on Fore Street by the market cross and the town hall.

stops.title: Vestibule
stops.desc: You are now inside St Nun's church having entered through the wood and glass vestibule.

stops.title: Kitchenette
stops.desc: The kitchenette is to the right of the vestibule. It is an area for refreshments and recently installed.

stops.title: Font
stops.desc: The font has moved to this position at the back of the church from nearer to the front door. It has opened up space at the back of the building.

stops.title: Pilkington window
stops.desc: This is the Pilkington stained-glass window - the only picture window in St Nun's church.

stops.title: Organ
stops.desc: This is the organ of the church.

stops.title: The Altar
stops.desc: You are now standing before the main altar at St Nun's church.
